hero.title: About ThaiViet Ltd
hero.subtitle: Mastering the art of surface finish across the Wellington region.

Quality interior & exterior painting, plastering, wallpapering, cedar staining and decorating — backed by a 5-year workmanship guarantee. Proudly serving Wellington, Lower Hutt, Upper Hutt, Porirua, Kāpiti Coast & Wairarapa since 2008.

intro.title: Wellington's Premier Painting Company.
intro.body: As a Registered Master Painter and Eco-Decorator, Thai Viet brings years of hands-on experience transforming homes and businesses across Wellington. From interior and exterior painting to plastering, cedar staining, wallpapering, and water blasting — no job is too big or too small. We treat every home as if it were our own.
intro.testimonialQuote: The quality of finish exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend ThaiViet.

services.title: Our Services
services.ctaText: Contact our team to discuss your specific project needs.

cards.title: Interior Painting
cards.desc: Premium interior wall and ceiling painting for every room of the house.

cards.title: Exterior Painting
cards.desc: Long-lasting exterior coatings built to handle New Zealand weather.

cards.title: Roof Maintenance
cards.desc: Re-roofing, roof repairs and brand-new roofs for every roof type.

cards.title: Paint Stripping
cards.desc: Strip old layers down to a clean, paint-ready surface.

cards.title: Plastering & GIB Stopping
cards.desc: Smooth, level walls and crisp GIB stopping ready for a flawless finish.

cards.title: Wood Staining
cards.desc: Bring out the natural grain of timber while protecting it from the elements.

cards.title: Building Work
cards.desc: Minor carpentry, repairs, and prep work to get your project ready for paint.

cards.title: Flooring
cards.desc: Floor sanding and varnishing to bring tired timber floors back to a smooth, durable finish.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Our Painters in Wellington?
whyChoose.intro: Quality workmanship, transparent pricing, and dependable service from start to finish. Our accredited painting professionals deliver exceptional results across the Wellington region, keeping you informed every step of the way—from the initial quote to the final coat.
whyChoose.subtitle: What sets us apart
bullets: Clear, upfront pricing with no hidden costs
Trusted service throughout the Wellington region
whyChoose.closing: Whether you're refreshing a single room or repainting an entire property, our team is committed to delivering a smooth, professional experience and results you can be proud of.

process.title: Our Simple Process
process.subtitle: How we take your project from initial vision to final completion.

steps.title: Enquiry
steps.desc: Send us your details online or call us directly.

steps.title: Site Visit
steps.desc: We visit your property for a thorough assessment.

steps.title: Detailed Quote
steps.desc: You receive a clear, comprehensive fixed-price quote.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.desc: Surface prep begins—the key to a great finish.

steps.title: Painting
steps.desc: Our craftsmen apply premium coats of paint.

items.quote: ThaiViet recently completed the painting for our new house in Plimmerton. The professionalism was outstanding — the attention to detail in the plastering and the crispness of the paint lines made all the difference.
items.name: Peter Mathews

items.quote: Thai and his team repainted the exterior of our 1920s villa in Karori. They prepped meticulously, kept the worksite tidy every day, and finished bang on schedule. Couldn't be happier.
items.name: Sarah Roberts

items.quote: We had ThaiViet repaint our office over a long weekend so we could open Monday morning with no downtime. Quote was clear, the work was tidy, and they came back to touch up two small spots without any fuss.
items.name: James Liu

items.quote: Booked Thai for a full interior repaint of our Lower Hutt home. Quote was honest, the team turned up on time every day, and the finish is flawless. Highly recommend.
items.name: Hannah Williams

items.quote: Cedar staining job on our deck and pergola in Whitby. Excellent prep work, careful around our garden, and the colour match was spot on. Will use them again.
items.name: David Chen

serviceAreas.title: Service Areas
serviceAreas.intro: Based in Porirua, we proudly serve the wider Wellington region with premium painting, plastering, and decorating for residential and commercial clients:

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.subtitle: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation consultation and quote for your next project.

paragraphs: As a Registered Master Painter and Eco-Decorator with multiple years of experience under his tool belt, Thai and his team have been transforming homes and businesses across the Wellington region.

As the owner of ThaiViet Ltd, Thai leads a large team of tradesmen offering interior and exterior painting, plastering, cedar staining, wallpapering, water blasting, spray painting, and property maintenance. We stay true to our slogan: "Your home. Our Care." — treating every house as if it were our own.
heritage.quote: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: With customer satisfaction as our highest priority, we aim to provide a service that exceeds your expectations every time.

cards.title: Artisan Painting
cards.desc: Interior, exterior, and roof painting using premium coatings designed for Wellington's coastal conditions.

cards.title: Master Wallpapering
cards.desc: Seamless pattern matching and bubble-free installation for luxury interiors.

cards.title: Total Solutions
cards.desc: Comprehensive maintenance that safeguards your investment for decades to come.

people.title: Highly Skilled Professionals
paragraphs: Our large team of tradesmen put the customer's needs first and work efficiently towards their deadlines. They arrive on site on time every morning, are friendly, professional, and respectful of your living environment.

We take pride in our punctuality, professional conduct, and the respectful way we treat your space. If you have any questions about the calibre of our work, we can provide you with a list of referees to get in touch with.

preparation.title: Our Commitment to Preparation
preparation.intro: A great finish is 90% preparation. We don't cut corners; we sand them, prime them, and ensure the foundation is perfect before a single drop of paint is applied.

items.label: Referral Rate
items.desc: Our business thrives on word-of-mouth excellence.

items.label: Years Serving Wellington
items.desc: Deep local knowledge of the capital's unique builds.

items.label: Satisfaction Guarantee
items.desc: We don't leave until you're absolutely delighted.

items.label: Painter Network
items.desc: Trusted by the city's leading architects.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.subtitle: Join the hundreds of satisfied Wellingtonians who trust ThaiViet Ltd for their home's care.

serviceDetails.name: Interior Painting
serviceDetails.heroTitle: A flawless finish, room by room.
serviceDetails.heroSub: From a single feature wall to a whole-home repaint, we deliver dust-free preparation and a smooth, hard-wearing finish that lifts every room — all backed by our 5-year workmanship guarantee.
serviceDetails.introTitle: Every surface inside your home, beautifully finished.
serviceDetails.introA: Whether you're refreshing one tired room or repainting an entire house, our team treats your home like our own. We move and protect your furniture, mask every edge, and keep the site tidy from the first day to the last.
serviceDetails.introB: A great finish is 90% preparation — so we fill, sand and prime properly before a single drop of colour goes on.

features.title: Walls & Ceilings
features.desc: Even, roller-perfect coverage with crisp, hand-cut lines where wall meets ceiling and trim.

features.title: Trim, Skirting & Architraves
features.desc: Glass-smooth enamel finishes on skirting boards, door frames and window reveals.

features.title: Doors & Cabinetry
features.desc: Spray-smooth refinishing for interior doors, built-ins and kitchen cabinetry — a fresh look without a full renovation.

features.title: Feature & Accent Walls
features.desc: Deep, true colour on statement walls — perfectly masked and bleed-free at every edge.

features.title: Plaster & GIB Repair
features.desc: Cracks, dings and patchy plaster made good and stopped to a Level 4–5 finish before paint.

features.title: Low-VOC & Eco Options
features.desc: As registered Eco-Decorators we offer low-odour, low-VOC paints that are kinder to your family and home.

serviceDetails.midTitle: Not sure on colour? We'll help you choose.
midParas: Choosing a colour is the hardest part — so we make it easy. We'll bring sample pots and fan decks to your home, look at how the light falls through the day, and help you land on tones that suit your space and stick to your budget.
We work with New Zealand's leading paint systems and only apply premium interior-grade products built to wash, wear and last.
midList: Holes filled, cracks repaired, surfaces sanded

showcase.title: Modern Villa Refresh — Karori
showcase.blurb: Precision interior detailing and feature wall.

showcase.title: Wellington CBD Office
showcase.blurb: High-traffic durable finishes for corporate HQ.

showcase.title: Newtown Apartment Repaint
showcase.blurb: Full interior repaint between tenancies.

serviceDetails.name: Exterior Painting
serviceDetails.heroSub: Weather-tight, UV- and salt-resistant finishes built for New Zealand's coastal and windy conditions — backed by our 5-year workmanship guarantee.
serviceDetails.introTitle: A finish that defends your home for years.
serviceDetails.introA: Wellington weather is hard on a house. We prepare every surface properly — wash, scrape, treat and prime — so the new coating bonds tight and stays looking sharp through wind, rain and salt air.
serviceDetails.introB: From weatherboard villas to modern cladding, we colour-match, protect your gardens and leave the site spotless every evening.

features.title: Weatherboard & Cladding
features.desc: Timber, fibre-cement and brick — prepped and coated to suit the substrate.

features.title: Wash & Treat
features.desc: Soft-wash, mould treatment and rust spot-priming before any topcoat.

features.title: UV & Salt Resistant
features.desc: Premium exterior systems chosen for coastal exposure and harsh sun.

features.title: 5-Year Guarantee
features.desc: Workmanship guaranteed in writing, so you can book with confidence.

midParas: We only apply premium exterior-grade products and follow the manufacturer's spec coat-for-coat — the detail that decides whether a paint job lasts 5 years or 15.

showcase.title: Plimmerton Coastal Home
showcase.blurb: Weatherboard restoration and protective coating.

showcase.title: Kāpiti Beach House
showcase.blurb: Coastal weatherboard repaint with full prep.

showcase.title: Architectural Waterfront Estate
showcase.blurb: Weather-resistant coatings for coastal exposure.

serviceDetails.quote: They prepped everything properly before a brush touched the house. Two winters on and it still looks freshly done.

serviceDetails.name: Roof Maintenance
serviceDetails.heroSub: From patching a leak to a full re-roof or a brand-new roof — we fix, replace and install roofs of every type across Wellington, built to last.
serviceDetails.introTitle: The right fix — repair, re-roof, or new build.
serviceDetails.introA: Whether your roof needs a quick repair, a full re-roof, or a brand-new build, we handle it end to end. We inspect the structure, sort flashings and fixings, and replace what's past saving — no shortcuts, no mess left behind.
serviceDetails.introB: Fixed-price quotes and honest advice: we'll tell you when a repair will do and when re-roofing is the smarter spend.

features.title: Re-Roofing
features.desc: Strip the old roof and replace it with new long-run steel, tile or membrane.

features.title: Roof Repairs
features.desc: Fix leaks, cracked tiles, rusted sheets, flashings and blocked valleys — fast.

features.title: New Roofs
features.desc: Design and install a brand-new roof for new builds, extensions and re-clads.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.desc: Most repairs sorted in a day; full re-roofs planned around the weather.

midParas: A roof only works when every layer does. We check the framing, underlay, flashings and fixings before we quote — so you get the right fix, not just the cheapest one. Re-roofs and new roofs go on with quality underlay and correctly lapped sheets that shed Wellington weather for decades.
midList: Full re-roof in steel, tile or membrane
New-roof design & install for builds and extensions

showcase.title: Whitby Full Re-Roof
showcase.blurb: Old iron stripped and replaced with new long-run steel.

showcase.title: Khandallah Leak Repair
showcase.blurb: Traced a persistent leak to failed flashing and sealed it for good.

showcase.title: Lower Hutt New Roof
showcase.blurb: Brand-new roof designed and installed over a rear extension.

serviceDetails.quote: They found the leak two other roofers missed, fixed it properly, and the price didn't budge.

serviceDetails.name: Paint Stripping
serviceDetails.heroTitle: Back to a sound, paintable surface.
serviceDetails.heroSub: Safe, thorough removal of old and failing coatings — heat, chemical and sanding methods — to create the perfect base for a flawless new finish.
serviceDetails.introTitle: The right base makes the whole job last.
serviceDetails.introA: When paint is cracking, flaking or built up over decades, the only real fix is to strip it back. We remove failing layers safely and reveal the original detail underneath.
serviceDetails.introB: We handle older lead-based coatings with proper containment and care, keeping your family and our team safe throughout.

features.title: Multiple Methods
features.desc: Heat guns, safe chemical strippers and machine sanding as needed.

features.title: Lead-Safe
features.desc: Older lead paint removed with containment and safe disposal.

features.title: Detail Revealed
features.desc: Ornate timber and mouldings brought back without damage.

features.title: Sound Substrate
features.desc: Surfaces left clean, stable and ready to prime.

serviceDetails.midTitle: Strip, repair, prime — ready for paint.
midParas: Stripping is patient work. We take the time to remove coatings cleanly, fix what we find underneath, and prime the bare surface so the new system has something solid to grip.

showcase.title: Thorndon Heritage Strip
showcase.blurb: Decades of failing layers removed back to bare timber.

showcase.title: Mt Victoria Restoration
showcase.blurb: Full strip and prep before a heritage repaint.

showcase.title: Kelburn Villa Facade
showcase.blurb: Lead-safe removal on a 1910s street frontage.

serviceDetails.quote: They uncovered detailing we didn't know was there and prepped it perfectly for repainting. Meticulous.

serviceDetails.name: Plastering & GIB Stopping
serviceDetails.heroSub: GIB stopping, plaster repairs and Level 4–5 finishing — the smooth, seamless base every great paint finish needs.
serviceDetails.introTitle: The surface under the paint matters most.
serviceDetails.introA: Bumps, cracks and rough joints show through paint under raking light. Our plasterers stop, patch and skim to a true, flat finish so your walls look immaculate once coated.
serviceDetails.introB: New builds, renovations or tired old walls — we deliver a paint-ready surface to the level you need.

features.title: GIB Stopping & Jointing
features.desc: Crisp, invisible joints on new plasterboard.

features.title: Plaster Repairs
features.desc: Cracks, dings and water damage made good.

features.title: Level 5 Finish
features.desc: Full skim for flawless walls under critical lighting.

features.title: Ready for Paint
features.desc: Sanded, dust-managed and primed if required.

midParas: We work clean and check our surfaces under light as we go — because a Level 5 skim is only as good as the eye that inspects it. The result is wall you simply don't notice, in the best way.

showcase.title: Lower Hutt New Build
showcase.blurb: Full GIB stopping and skim, ready for paint.

showcase.title: Kelburn Renovation
showcase.blurb: Wall repairs and skim coat across the whole house.

showcase.title: Karori Ceiling Repair
showcase.blurb: Artex removal and a fresh Level 5 ceiling.

serviceDetails.quote: The walls came up dead flat — you can see it the moment the light hits them. Faultless plastering.

serviceDetails.name: Wood Staining
serviceDetails.heroSub: Restore and protect cladding, decks, pergolas and cedar with premium stains that deepen the grain and shield against the elements.
serviceDetails.introA: Timber that's gone grey and dry can be brought back to a rich, warm finish. We clean, sand and prepare the surface, then apply premium oil-based stains that soak in and protect.
serviceDetails.introB: Cedar weatherboards, decks, fences and feature timber — we match the look you want and seal it for the long run.

features.title: Cedar & Cladding
features.desc: Specialist prep and staining for cedar weatherboards.

features.title: Decks & Pergolas
features.desc: Sanded back and re-stained for grip and protection.

features.title: Premium Oil Stains
features.desc: Penetrating, UV-resistant stains that enrich the grain.

features.title: Weather Sealed
features.desc: Protected against moisture, sun and Wellington wind.

midParas: The secret to timber that looks great for years is preparation and the right product. We strip back the tired surface, feed the wood and lock in the colour with quality stains.

showcase.title: Whitby Cedar Deck & Pergola
showcase.blurb: Cedar staining with full surface prep.

showcase.title: Wairarapa Farmhouse Timber
showcase.blurb: Exterior timber stain and protective seal.

showcase.title: Eastbourne Cedar Cladding
showcase.blurb: Coastal cedar re-stained and weather-sealed.

serviceDetails.quote: Our grey, tired deck looks brand new — the colour is gorgeous and water just beads off it now.

serviceDetails.name: Building Work
serviceDetails.heroTitle: More than paint — one trusted team.
serviceDetails.heroSub: Practical building and renovation work to repair, upgrade and maintain your home, handled alongside your painting by people you already trust.
serviceDetails.introTitle: Fix it and finish it, all in one go.
serviceDetails.introA: Often a great repaint needs a little building work first — a rotten weatherboard, a tired deck, a door that won't close. We handle it, so you don't have to chase a second trade.
serviceDetails.introB: From small repairs to bathroom and kitchen renovations, our team brings the same care and tidiness you'd expect from our painting.

features.title: Repairs & Maintenance
features.desc: Weatherboards, trims, door hinges and hardware sorted.

features.title: Bathroom & Kitchen
features.desc: Renovations and refits handled end to end.

features.title: Fences & Decks
features.desc: New builds and repairs, ready to stain or paint.

features.title: Roof Replacement
features.desc: Full roof replacement where re-coating won't do.

serviceDetails.midTitle: Repairs that set up a perfect finish.
midParas: Because the same team does the building and the painting, nothing falls through the cracks — the repairs are done with the final finish already in mind.

showcase.title: Thorndon Carpentry Repairs
showcase.blurb: Weatherboard replacement and trim repairs before paint.

showcase.title: Plimmerton Garage Prep
showcase.blurb: Minor rebuild and patching before exterior repaint.

showcase.title: Karori Deck Rebuild
showcase.blurb: New deck framing and boards, ready for stain.

serviceDetails.quote: They replaced rotten boards, rehung two doors and painted the lot — one team, one tidy job. Brilliant.

serviceDetails.name: Flooring
serviceDetails.heroSub: Professional sanding and a hard-wearing protective finish that brings worn floorboards back to a warm, durable shine.
serviceDetails.introA: Decades of wear, scratches and old coatings come off with careful machine sanding. We then seal the timber with a tough, low-odour finish built for everyday family life.
serviceDetails.introB: Living rooms, hallways and whole homes — we contain the dust, work clean, and leave floors you'll want to show off.

features.title: Floor Sanding
features.desc: Multi-stage machine sanding back to fresh, smooth timber.

features.title: Varnish & Seal
features.desc: Hard-wearing polyurethane in matte, satin or gloss.

features.title: Dust-Managed
features.desc: Dust-extraction sanding keeps your home liveable.

features.title: Like-New Finish
features.desc: Even colour and a durable, easy-clean surface.

midParas: Great floors come down to even sanding and the right number of coats. We don't rush either — the result is a smooth, hard-wearing finish that lasts for years of foot traffic.

showcase.title: Karori Villa Timber Floors
showcase.blurb: Full sand-back and three coats of polyurethane.

showcase.title: Lower Hutt Floor Refinish
showcase.blurb: Sand and varnish across living room and hallway.

showcase.title: Newtown Apartment Floors
showcase.blurb: Worn boards revived with a satin finish.

serviceDetails.quote: I can't believe these are the same floors. Smooth, warm and so easy to keep clean now.

posts.title: How to Choose the Right Paint Colour for Every Room
posts.excerpt: Picking the perfect colour can be overwhelming. Our experts break down how lighting, room size, and mood all play a role in your final choice.

posts.title: Why Surface Preparation is the Secret to a Lasting Paint Job
posts.excerpt: Most paint failures come down to poor prep work. Learn what professional painters do before a single drop of paint is applied.

posts.title: Best Time of Year to Paint Your Home's Exterior in Wellington
posts.excerpt: Wellington's weather can be unpredictable. Here's when to schedule your exterior paint job for best adhesion and durability.

posts.title: Low-VOC & Eco-Friendly Paints: Are They Worth It?
posts.excerpt: As a registered Eco-Decorator, we understand the benefits of low-VOC paints for your family's health and the environment.

posts.title: Minimising Business Disruption During a Commercial Repaint
posts.excerpt: Repainting your business premises doesn't have to halt operations. Our staged approach keeps your team and customers comfortable.

posts.title: 2024 Wallpaper Trends Taking Over New Zealand Homes
posts.excerpt: From bold botanicals to textured neutrals — here are the wallpaper styles our clients are loving this year.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ThaiViet Ltd, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your information when you visit our website or contact us about our painting, plastering, decorating, and renovation services.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
paragraphs: We may collect the following information:
bullets: Property address (where relevant to your enquiry)
Details about your project or service request
Information you provide through our contact forms, emails, or phone calls
Basic website usage information collected through cookies or analytics

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
bullets: Communicate with you about your project
Improve our website and customer service
Meet our legal and business obligations

sections.heading: Sharing Your Information
paragraphs: We do not sell or rent your personal information.
We may share your information with trusted contractors, suppliers, or service providers only when necessary to deliver our services or where required by law.

sections.heading: Data Security
paragraphs: We take reasonable steps to protect your personal information from unauthorised access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.

sections.heading: Cookies
paragraphs: Our website may use cookies and analytics tools to improve your browsing experience and help us understand how visitors use our website. You can disable cookies through your browser settings if you prefer.

sections.heading: Your Rights
paragraphs: You may request access to the personal information we hold about you or ask us to correct any inaccurate information. Please contact us if you have any privacy-related questions or requests.

privacy.contactIntro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal information, please contact:
privacy.closing: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page.
